diagrams.title: Resource Utilization Threshold Zones
diagrams.description: Shows color-coded zones for different utilization levels with corresponding actions
elements: Red zone (90%+: Critical - immediate action required
diagrams.purpose: Helps understand when to take preventive action before system failure

diagrams.title: Capacity Trend Over Time
diagrams.description: Line graph showing resource utilization increasing over months with predicted failure point
diagrams.purpose: Visualizes how trending analysis predicts when capacity will be exhausted

diagrams.title: Vertical vs Horizontal Scaling
diagrams.description: Comparison diagram showing scale-up and scale-out approaches
diagrams.purpose: Understanding different approaches to adding capacity

diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Process Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flowchart of the capacity planning workflow
elements: Monitor → Analyze → Forecast → Plan → Implement → Review
Feedback loop from Review back to Monitor
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the continuous nature of capacity management
